overall.description: First-person driving footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a vehicle navigating through a heavy rainstorm at night in a futuristic neon-lit city. The camera approaches and passes under a massive holographic billboard structure before continuing into the downtown area with visible skyscrapers and traffic.

scene_state.functional_zone: rain-slicked multi-lane highway approaching holographic billboard

agents.ego_description: driving steadily through heavy rain on a dark highway toward a distant illuminated billboard structure

entered.detail: large hexagonal illuminated structure visible in the distance through the rain
rain-slicked multi-lane road reflecting neon lights
futuristic skyscrapers with glowing windows visible on the horizon

segments.scene_description: The segment shows a first-person driving perspective through a heavy rainstorm at night. The vehicle travels along a wet asphalt highway toward a distant holographic billboard structure, with neon-lit skyscrapers barely visible through the rain on the left horizon. The atmosphere is dark and atmospheric with rain particles filling the screen.

scene_state.functional_zone: underneath large holographic billboard structure with bright illumination

events.description: entering the area beneath the massive holographic billboard structure
bright holographic display and support structures temporarily dominate and obscure the forward view

agents.ego_description: continuing to drive forward while passing directly underneath the massive illuminated billboard with bright overhead lights

entered.detail: white structural tripod supports holding up the holographic display
intense white illumination from the underside of the billboard structure

segments.scene_description: The vehicle passes beneath a massive holographic billboard structure that dominates the field of view. Bright artificial lights from the billboard illuminate the rain and road below, while white tripod support structures frame the sides of the view. The scene transitions from open highway to a semi-covered space under the advertisement.

scene_state.functional_zone: neon-lit downtown intersection with visible skyline

events.description: exiting the billboard structure into open downtown area with expanding view of city skyline

agents.ego_description: driving into the open downtown area with increasing visibility of surrounding skyscrapers and approaching traffic

notable_agents.action: vehicle ahead with red brake lights visible, moving slowly in the rain

entered.detail: dense cluster of illuminated futuristic skyscrapers forming the downtown skyline
tall buildings with bright neon signage and glowing windows lining the street
busy downtown intersection with multiple lanes and traffic signals ahead

segments.scene_description: Having passed the billboard structure, the scene opens into a wide downtown intersection surrounded by neon-lit skyscrapers. The city skyline becomes visible ahead with dense clusters of illuminated buildings, while other vehicles with glowing tail lights are visible in the distance. The rain continues to fall heavily as the vehicle approaches the busy city center.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a first-person driving perspective through a torrential night rainstorm that transitions from a dark highway into a luminous, neon-drenched city center. It begins on a wet asphalt road where neon-lit skyscrapers are barely visible through a dense veil of rain particles. As the vehicle advances, the open highway gives way to a semi-covered space, passing directly beneath a massive holographic billboard that floods the road and falling rain with bright artificial light. The scene then opens up as the camera emerges from under the billboard's tripod supports into a wide downtown intersection. Finally, the view expands to reveal a dense skyline of illuminated skyscrapers and the glowing tail lights of distant traffic as the vehicle pushes deeper into the heart of the city.
